tasks.subject: Task 0: Add stash config vars to Settings
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Define all stash-related Pydantic Settings fields.

**Files:**
- Modify: apps-microservices/crawler-service/app/core/config.py

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- 7 new fields with documented defaults
- Settings instantiation succeeds

**Verify:** `python -c 'from app.core.config import settings; print(settings.STASH_SHARED_PATH)'` → `/app/stash`

```json:metadata
{"files":["apps-microservices/crawler-service/app/core/config.py"],"verifyCommand":"cd apps-microservices/crawler-service && python -c 'from app.core.config import settings; assert settings.STASH_SHARED_PATH == \"/app/stash\"; print(\"OK\")'","acceptanceCriteria":["STASH_SHARED_PATH default /app/stash","STASH_DOWNLOAD_REQUESTS_PATH default /app/gcs-stash-requests","STASH_DOWNLOAD_RESULTS_PATH default /app/gcs-stash-downloads","STASH_LOCK_TTL_SECONDS 600","UNSTASH_LOCK_TTL_SECONDS 600","UNSTASH_TIMEOUT_SECONDS 300","UNSTASH_CLEANUP_GRACE_SECONDS 30"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Parametrize upload_daemon.sh
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add UPLOAD_WATCH_DIR + UPLOAD_GCS_PREFIX + UPLOAD_DEAD_LETTER_SUBDIR env vars. Defaults preserve current behavior.

**Files:**
- Modify: tools/upload_daemon.sh

**Verify:** `bash -n tools/upload_daemon.sh` + smoke-test default + stash override prints correct target bucket URL.

```json:metadata
{"files":["tools/upload_daemon.sh"],"verifyCommand":"bash -n tools/upload_daemon.sh && GCS_BUCKET_NAME=test UPLOAD_GCS_PREFIX=stash bash -c 'source tools/upload_daemon.sh 2>&1 || true' | grep -q 'gs://test/stash/'","acceptanceCriteria":["Default invocation uploads to gs://bucket/crawls/","UPLOAD_GCS_PREFIX=stash routes to gs://bucket/stash/","Retry logic + dead-letter unchanged"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Parametrize download_daemon.sh + 2-phase commit
tasks.description:
**Goal:** DOWNLOAD_GCS_PREFIX + DELETE_AFTER_DOWNLOAD env vars + new poll branch for *.unstash-confirmed markers. On gcloud rm success write .unstash-cleanup-done; on failure retain marker + log WARNING.

**Files:**
- Modify: tools/download_daemon.sh

**Verify:** Syntax check + smoke-test default + smoke-test DELETE_AFTER_DOWNLOAD=true marker handling.

```json:metadata
{"files":["tools/download_daemon.sh"],"verifyCommand":"bash -n tools/download_daemon.sh","acceptanceCriteria":["Default downloads from crawls/ prefix","DOWNLOAD_GCS_PREFIX=stash routes to stash/","DELETE_AFTER_DOWNLOAD=true scans .unstash-confirmed markers","gcloud rm success -> .unstash-cleanup-done written","gcloud rm failure -> marker retained for retry + WARNING logged"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Add stash volume mounts to docker-compose.yaml
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Bind-mount 3 new host dirs.

**Files:**
- Modify: apps-microservices/crawler-service/docker-compose.yaml

**Verify:** `docker-compose --profile crawling config | grep stash` finds 3 mounts.

```json:metadata
{"files":["apps-microservices/crawler-service/docker-compose.yaml"],"verifyCommand":"docker-compose --profile crawling -f apps-microservices/crawler-service/docker-compose.yaml config | grep -E '(stash|gcs-stash)' | wc -l","acceptanceCriteria":["./crawler_stash:/app/stash","./crawler_stash_download_requests:/app/gcs-stash-requests","./crawler_stash_download_results:/app/gcs-stash-downloads","Existing mounts unchanged"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Add StashResponse + UnstashResponse schemas
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Pydantic response models for new endpoints.

**Files:**
- Modify: apps-microservices/crawler-service/app/schemas/crawler.py

**Verify:** Import + model instantiation with sample data succeeds.

```json:metadata
{"files":["apps-microservices/crawler-service/app/schemas/crawler.py"],"verifyCommand":"cd apps-microservices/crawler-service && python -c 'from app.schemas.crawler import StashResponse, UnstashResponse; print(\"OK\")'","acceptanceCriteria":["StashResponse: crawl_id, status, stash_path, stashed_at","UnstashResponse: crawl_id, status, restored_to, elapsed_seconds, optional gcs_cleanup_status"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Implement stash_crawl() + ownership-safe lock helpers
tasks.description:
**Goal:** stash_crawl method + REPLICA_ID constant + _acquire/_release_ownership_lock helpers (Lua compare-and-delete).

**Files:**
- Modify: apps-microservices/crawler-service/app/core/crawler_manager.py

**Verify:** Import smoke test + Task 9 unit tests pass for stash branches.

```json:metadata
{"files":["apps-microservices/crawler-service/app/core/crawler_manager.py"],"verifyCommand":"cd apps-microservices/crawler-service && pytest tests/test_crawler_manager_stash.py -v -k 'stash and not unstash'","acceptanceCriteria":["Pre-checks enforce conflict matrix","Disk pre-flight reuses _get_archives_disk_state + _estimate_archive_required_bytes","Tar via .staging + atomic move","Redis stashed_at set BEFORE local cleanup","Ownership-safe lock release via Lua eval"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Implement unstash_crawl() with 2-phase commit
tasks.description:
**Goal:** unstash_crawl with full 2-phase commit: .request → poll .done/.error → extract → .unstash-confirmed → poll .unstash-cleanup-done (grace window) → clear stashed_at.

**Files:**
- Modify: apps-microservices/crawler-service/app/core/crawler_manager.py

**Verify:** Task 9 unit tests pass for unstash branches.

```json:metadata
{"files":["apps-microservices/crawler-service/app/core/crawler_manager.py"],"verifyCommand":"cd apps-microservices/crawler-service && pytest tests/test_crawler_manager_stash.py -v -k 'unstash'","acceptanceCriteria":["NOT_STASHED 409 if stashed_at null","504 UNSTASH_TIMEOUT when no .done","502 GCS_DOWNLOAD_FAILED on .error","502 EXTRACT_FAILED preserves stashed_at + no .unstash-confirmed written","Success: gcs_cleanup_status='cleaned'","Cleanup grace expired: gcs_cleanup_status='deferred'"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Add POST /stash + POST /unstash router endpoints
tasks.description:
**Goal:** REST wiring with get_job_or_recover dependency.

**Files:**
- Modify: apps-microservices/crawler-service/app/router/crawler.py

**Verify:** Routes registered in app.routes.

```json:metadata
{"files":["apps-microservices/crawler-service/app/router/crawler.py"],"verifyCommand":"cd apps-microservices/crawler-service && python -c 'from main import app; r=[x.path for x in app.routes]; assert \"/stash/{crawl_id}\" in r and \"/unstash/{crawl_id}\" in r; print(\"OK\")'","acceptanceCriteria":["POST /stash 202 StashResponse","POST /unstash 200 UnstashResponse","HTTPException surfaced unchanged","get_job_or_recover dependency"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Extend cleanup_archives for stash dirs
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add STASH_DOWNLOAD_RESULTS_PATH + STASH_DOWNLOAD_REQUESTS_PATH to the background cleanup loop.

**Files:**
- Modify: apps-microservices/crawler-service/app/core/crawler_manager.py (cleanup_archives method)

**Verify:** Existing cleanup tests pass + Task 9 test_cleanup_includes_stash_dirs passes.

```json:metadata
{"files":["apps-microservices/crawler-service/app/core/crawler_manager.py"],"verifyCommand":"cd apps-microservices/crawler-service && pytest tests/test_crawler_manager.py -v -k cleanup","acceptanceCriteria":["STASH_DOWNLOAD_RESULTS_PATH scanned (.tar.gz/.done/.error/.unstash-confirmed/.unstash-cleanup-done)","STASH_DOWNLOAD_REQUESTS_PATH scanned (.request)","STASH_SHARED_PATH NOT touched","Existing behavior preserved"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: Write unit tests for stash/unstash
tasks.description:
**Goal:** 15 unit tests covering all branches.

**Files:**
- Create: apps-microservices/crawler-service/tests/test_crawler_manager_stash.py

**Verify:** `pytest tests/test_crawler_manager_stash.py -v` → all pass.

```json:metadata
{"files":["apps-microservices/crawler-service/tests/test_crawler_manager_stash.py"],"verifyCommand":"cd apps-microservices/crawler-service && pytest tests/test_crawler_manager_stash.py -v","acceptanceCriteria":["15 tests covering spec Section 8","AsyncMock fixtures for Redis","tmp_path for filesystem","All pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 10: Write integration + daemon tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** 3 bash scripts: hermetic daemon parametrization + E2E GCS round-trip + dead-letter verification.

**Files:**
- Create: apps-microservices/crawler-service/tests/test_daemon_parametrization.sh
- Create: apps-microservices/crawler-service/tests/integration/test_stash_unstash_e2e.sh
- Create: apps-microservices/crawler-service/tests/integration/test_stash_dead_letter.sh

**Verify:** `bash tests/test_daemon_parametrization.sh` passes (hermetic). E2E + dead-letter run manually with GCS auth.

```json:metadata
{"files":["apps-microservices/crawler-service/tests/test_daemon_parametrization.sh","apps-microservices/crawler-service/tests/integration/test_stash_unstash_e2e.sh","apps-microservices/crawler-service/tests/integration/test_stash_dead_letter.sh"],"verifyCommand":"bash apps-microservices/crawler-service/tests/test_daemon_parametrization.sh","acceptanceCriteria":["Daemon parametrization hermetic + passes locally","E2E round-trip stash + unstash works","Dead-letter triggered after 3 retries"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 11: Update documentation
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Reflect new endpoints + daemon variants across 4 doc files.

**Files:**
- Modify: apps-microservices/crawler-service/CLAUDE.md
- Modify: apps-microservices/crawler-service/README.md
- Modify: docs/daemon_guide.md
- Modify: tools/CLAUDE.md

**Verify:** `grep -c 'POST /stash' apps-microservices/crawler-service/CLAUDE.md docs/daemon_guide.md` ≥ 3.

```json:metadata
{"files":["apps-microservices/crawler-service/CLAUDE.md","apps-microservices/crawler-service/README.md","docs/daemon_guide.md","tools/CLAUDE.md"],"verifyCommand":"grep -c 'POST /stash' apps-microservices/crawler-service/CLAUDE.md docs/daemon_guide.md","acceptanceCriteria":["crawler-service CLAUDE.md: API entries + Stash section + cleanup note","README.md: stash entries in Administrative section","daemon_guide.md: 3 new Shared Dirs rows + systemd examples + orphan troubleshooting","tools/CLAUDE.md: new env vars listed"]}
```
